steps.title: Attach the appositive
steps.content: The phrase A politician from South Carolina describes Robert B. Elliott. After that opening phrase, the sentence should immediately name Elliott so the modifier attaches to the person it describes.

steps.title: Reject misplaced openings
steps.content: B begins with a verb and leaves the modifier without a clear noun. C makes constituents the noun being described as the politician, and D begins with the prepositional phrase in 1870 instead of the person being renamed. The answer is A.
